_comment: Acquired-company contact routing for the mRNA Therapeutics play. THIN SCAFFOLD: no SME-confirmed acquired-company routes exist yet (playbook is v1, no feedback round). The rule stays a SCREEN: every email-vs-company domain mismatch is FLAGGED for operator review with the live domain, never auto-resolved.
